items.name: Soft Pink Intense Matte Lipstick
items.description: Soft Pink Intense Matte Lipstick delivers bold, timeless beauty with a powerful matte finish. Featuring a soft pink tone with rich pigment and a smooth, velvety texture, this lipstick adds confidence, elegance, and striking intensity to any look.
